Our Coconut Tapioca Kheer features tapioca pearls bathed in a luscious, creamy milk reduction and infused with the rich and exotic flavor of coconut. Experience pure bliss with every spoonful. For those seeking a guilt-free treat, we at @laddooh.in offer sugar-free options that don’t compromise on taste.

Since we cater to bulk orders only, we have opened a summer window to accept small batches of bulk orders for this special dessert.
